tests.description: Fresh mode clears every connected flag to false.
tests.key: asFresh › clears connected on every provider when fresh is true

tests.description: Fresh mode does not mutate the input list.
tests.key: asFresh › does not mutate the original list when fresh is true

tests.description: Empty input yields an empty list in both modes.
tests.key: asFresh › handles an empty list

tests.description: Fresh mode preserves identifying fields (id, name, blurb).
tests.key: asFresh › preserves id, name, and blurb when fresh is true

tests.description: The real health-source config also resets under fresh mode.
tests.key: asFresh › resets the pre-connected Apple Health entry in the real health config

tests.description: The real AI provider config has Claude pre-connected until made fresh.
tests.key: asFresh › resets the pre-connected Claude entry in the real AI config

tests.description: When not fresh, the list is returned as-is (identity preserved).
tests.key: asFresh › returns the same list reference when fresh is false

tests.description: Fresh mode strips the detail string so no stale status shows.
tests.key: asFresh › strips detail on every provider when fresh is true

tests.description: honors a custom radius argument
tests.key: circumference › computes a custom-radius circumference

tests.description: computes 2 pi r for the default dial radius
tests.key: circumference › computes the default-radius circumference

tests.description: negative values clamp up to zero
tests.key: clampPct › clamps a negative value to zero

tests.description: values above one hundred clamp down to one hundred
tests.key: clampPct › clamps an over-max value to one hundred

tests.description: the range boundaries themselves are preserved
tests.key: clampPct › preserves the zero and hundred boundaries

tests.description: values inside the range pass through unchanged
tests.key: clampPct › returns an in-range value unchanged

tests.description: NaN degrades to zero rather than propagating
tests.key: clampPct › returns zero for NaN

tests.description: escaping runs before emphasis so injected tags cannot survive as live markup
tests.key: emphasize › does not emit raw tags from an escaped span

tests.description: escapes HTML-significant characters so seed content cannot inject markup
tests.key: emphasize › escapes angle brackets and ampersands

tests.description: the empty string maps to the empty string
tests.key: emphasize › handles the empty string

tests.description: leaves text with no asterisks unchanged
tests.key: emphasize › passes through plain text

tests.description: wraps a single asterisk-delimited span in an em element
tests.key: emphasize › wraps an asterisk span in em

tests.description: converts more than one emphasis span in a single string
tests.key: emphasize › wraps multiple spans

tests.description: negative scores clamp to the full circumference
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › clamps a negative score to full circumference

tests.description: scores above one hundred clamp to a zero offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › clamps an over-max score to zero offset

tests.description: the mockup score of eighty-two matches the reference offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › matches the reference offset near eighty-two

tests.description: NaN degrades to the empty-ring offset
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns full circumference for NaN

tests.description: a zero score leaves the whole ring undrawn
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns the full circumference at a zero score

tests.description: a full score leaves no gap, so the offset is zero
tests.key: readinessDashOffset › returns zero offset at a full score
